overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk food court or transit station, featuring neon-lit vending machines, digital billboards, and pedestrian NPCs. The footage is from a video game with high-quality rendering and atmospheric green and pink lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, neon-lit corridor with green ambient lighting. An NPC stands at an Insta-Food vending machine on the right, while the camera moves forward past a food service counter on the left. A large digital billboard is visible ahead at the end of the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the large digital billboard on the right and makes a slight left turn. The Kabayan Foods sign becomes visible on the left while Burrito XXL vending machines appear on the right. Pedestrians walk through the slightly wider corridor.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the Kabayan Foods sign on the left and continues alongside the Burrito XXL vending machines on the right. An NPC interacts with one of the vending machines. The corridor continues ahead with consistent industrial neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, neon-lit cyberpunk corridor that gradually opens into a wider pedestrian thoroughfare. It begins in a tight space bathed in green ambient lighting, gliding past a food service counter and an NPC at an Insta-Food vending machine. As the camera reaches the end of the corridor, it passes a large digital billboard on the right and makes a slight left turn, causing the environment to expand. The scene then shifts toward a more populated area where the Kabayan Foods sign emerges on the left and Burrito XXL vending machines line the right. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory past these machines and interacting pedestrians, maintaining a consistent industrial neon glow as it moves deeper into the station.
